name: srdf
description: MoveIt2 SRDF generation, validation, and planning-semantics workflow. Use when creating, editing, regenerating, inspecting, or validating `.srdf` files, `gen_srdf()` sources, MoveIt planning groups, virtual joints, passive joints, end effectors, group states, disabled collisions, URDF-linked planning semantics, or SRDF handoff to CAD Explorer review. Use the URDF skill for robot structure, the SDF skill for simulator descriptions, and the cad-explorer skill for rendering, Explorer links, and opt
author: earthtojake
summary_zh: 专为 MoveIt2 打造的机器人语义配置工作流，能帮你轻松搞定配置文件的生成、编辑与校验，适合机器人运动规划开发与审查场景。
